title: Anil Gupta (philosopher)
body: Anil K. Gupta (; born 1949) is an Indian-American philosopher who works primarily in logic, epistemology, philosophy of language, and metaphysics. Gupta is the Alan Ross Anderson Distinguished Professor of Philosophy at the University of Pittsburgh. He is also a Fellow of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences. His most recent book, The Concept of Truth: The Israel Lectures, was published by Oxford University Press in January 2026.
